title: Bitter Chewy Midnight Oat Crumble
description: A gluten-free Brazilian dish that satisfies midnight cravings with its chewy oat texture and bitter taste.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, add the gluten-free oats and sea salt.
Pour in the boiling water gradually while stirring continuously to prevent lumps. Let it sit for about 5 minutes until absorbed by the oats.
Fold in unsweetened shredded coconut and dark chocolate chips evenly.
Drizzle vanilla extract over the mixture and stir well.
Transfer the mixture into a baking dish or muffin tin lined with parchment paper.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 20-25 minutes, until golden brown on top and firm to the touch.
Allow it to cool slightly before slicing and serving.
